name: M9 刺刀（★） | 表面淬火
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 表面淬火
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅
